description: Showcase a specific food product or ingredient combination with sensory-focused caption emphasizing taste and emotional response, paired with brand hashtags and direct audience engagement call-to-action.
structural_recipe: 1) Feature close-up shot of food product or ingredient combination (caramel melting with peanut butter, etc.); 2) Lead caption with Arabic sensory description (e.g., 'لما الكراميل يذوب بزبدة الفول السوداني'); 3) Include emoji expressing pleasure/satisfaction (😋); 4) Add emotional outcome statement (e.g., 'النتيجة: عشق 🤎'); 5) Direct call-to-action asking audience opinion ('جرّب وعطنا رأيك'); 6) Append 2-3 brand/campaign hashtags (#مننا_ويفهم_جونا #بارنز)
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond to food content that emphasizes sensory experience and emotional satisfaction. Arabic emotional language (عشق/love, pleasure emojis) creates relatability. Direct engagement requests ('give us your opinion') leverage Saudi social culture of community feedback and brand interaction. Product feature with ingredient transparency builds trust in F&B sector.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure Arabic caption authenticity—colloquial tone is crucial for engagement in Saudi market
Verify brand hashtags align with current campaign; outdated hashtags reduce discoverability
Food imagery must meet halal/cultural standards implicit in Saudi content norms
Avoid overly promotional tone; conversational and peer-recommendation style performs better
cultural_constraints: Content must respect Islamic dietary guidelines (halal compliance implicit)
Sensory language should align with Saudi Arabic dialect preferences
Avoid alcohol, pork, or non-halal ingredients in product features
